---
title: "629 final project"
author: "Ruicong Peng"
date: "2026-04"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
geometry: margin=1in
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

set.seed(629)
```



```{r step1-load-clinical-patient, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)

base_url <- "https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/cBioPortal/datahub/refs/heads/master/public/msk_chord_2024"

clinical_patient <- read.delim(
  paste0(base_url, "/data_clinical_patient.txt"),
  comment.char = "#",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

clinical_patient <- clinical_patient %>%
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    GENDER,
    CURRENT_AGE_DEID,
    STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED,
    OS_MONTHS,
    OS_STATUS
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    os_event = if_else(OS_STATUS == "1:DECEASED", 1L, 0L),
    age = as.numeric(CURRENT_AGE_DEID),
    gender = GENDER,
    stage = STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED
  )


dim(clinical_patient)

head(clinical_patient)

summary(clinical_patient$OS_MONTHS)

table(clinical_patient$OS_STATUS)


```

```{r step1-check-missing, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
colSums(is.na(clinical_patient[, c("PATIENT_ID", "age", "gender", "stage", "OS_MONTHS", "os_event")]))
```



```{r step2-load-merge-clinical-sample, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)

clinical_sample_raw <- read.delim(
  paste0(base_url, "/data_clinical_sample.txt"),
  comment.char = "#",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

clinical_sample_raw <- clinical_sample_raw %>%
  select(
    SAMPLE_ID,
    PATIENT_ID,
    CANCER_TYPE,
    SAMPLE_TYPE,
    PRIMARY_SITE,
    METASTATIC_SITE
  )

sample_count_check <- clinical_sample_raw %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID, name = "n_samples")

table(sample_count_check$n_samples)

target_cancer <- "Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer"


# Primary > Local Recurrence > Metastasis > Unknown
clinical_sample_one <- clinical_sample_raw %>%
  filter(CANCER_TYPE == target_cancer) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type_priority = case_when(
      SAMPLE_TYPE == "Primary" ~ 1,
      SAMPLE_TYPE == "Local Recurrence" ~ 2,
      SAMPLE_TYPE == "Metastasis" ~ 3,
      SAMPLE_TYPE == "Unknown" ~ 4,
      TRUE ~ 5
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(PATIENT_ID, sample_type_priority, SAMPLE_ID) %>%
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    SAMPLE_ID,
    CANCER_TYPE,
    SAMPLE_TYPE,
    PRIMARY_SITE,
    METASTATIC_SITE
  )

# Check
clinical_sample_one %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  pull(n) %>%
  table()


analysis_step2 <- clinical_patient %>%
  inner_join(clinical_sample_one, by = "PATIENT_ID")


dim(analysis_step2)


head(analysis_step2)


table(analysis_step2$SAMPLE_TYPE, useNA = "ifany")


analysis_step2 %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    min_n = min(n),
    max_n = max(n)
  )

```

```{r step3-4-mutation-feature-engineering, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

## =========================
## Confirm NSCLC cohort
## =========================
dim(analysis_step2)

table(analysis_step2$CANCER_TYPE, useNA = "ifany")


selected_samples <- analysis_step2 %>%
  select(PATIENT_ID, SAMPLE_ID)

length(unique(selected_samples$PATIENT_ID))
length(unique(selected_samples$SAMPLE_ID))


## =========================
##  Build genomic mutation indicators
## =========================
mut_raw <- read.delim(
  paste0(base_url, "/data_mutations.txt"),
  comment.char = "#",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)


colnames(mut_raw)


mut_nsclc <- mut_raw %>%
  select(
    Hugo_Symbol,
    Tumor_Sample_Barcode,
    Variant_Classification
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    selected_samples,
    by = c("Tumor_Sample_Barcode" = "SAMPLE_ID")
  )


dim(mut_nsclc)

length(unique(mut_nsclc$Tumor_Sample_Barcode))
length(unique(mut_nsclc$PATIENT_ID))


top_genes_tbl <- mut_nsclc %>%
  distinct(PATIENT_ID, Hugo_Symbol) %>%
  count(Hugo_Symbol, sort = TRUE)

head(top_genes_tbl, 20)


top_n_genes <- 10

top_genes <- top_genes_tbl %>%
  slice_head(n = top_n_genes) %>%
  pull(Hugo_Symbol)

top_genes


mut_wide <- mut_nsclc %>%
  filter(Hugo_Symbol %in% top_genes) %>%
  distinct(PATIENT_ID, Hugo_Symbol) %>%
  mutate(mutated = 1L) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Hugo_Symbol,
    values_from = mutated,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "mut_"
  )


dim(mut_wide)
head(mut_wide)


analysis_step4 <- analysis_step2 %>%
  left_join(mut_wide, by = "PATIENT_ID")


mutation_cols <- grep("^mut_", names(analysis_step4), value = TRUE)

analysis_step4 <- analysis_step4 %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(mutation_cols), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), 0L, .x))
  )


dim(analysis_step4)

head(analysis_step4)


analysis_step4 %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(mutation_cols), sum))


analysis_step4 %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    min_n = min(n),
    max_n = max(n)
  )

```


```{r step5-6-nlp-features-final-dataset, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

## =========================
## Progression features
## Baseline-only: use scans at or before sequencing
## =========================
progression_raw <- read.delim(
  paste0(base_url, "/data_timeline_progression.txt"),
  comment.char = "#",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)

progression_nsclc <- progression_raw %>%
  semi_join(analysis_step4 %>% select(PATIENT_ID), by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  filter(START_DATE <= 0) %>%   
  select(PATIENT_ID, START_DATE, NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY, PROCEDURE_TYPE)


progression_features <- progression_nsclc %>%
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_scans_progression = n(),
    progression_prob_mean = mean(NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY, na.rm = TRUE),
    progression_prob_max  = max(NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY, na.rm = TRUE),
    progression_prob_min  = min(NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY, na.rm = TRUE),
    progression_prob_sd   = sd(NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY, na.rm = TRUE),
    last_progression_prob = NLP_PROGRESSION_PROBABILITY[which.max(START_DATE)],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# NaN / Inf / -Inf
progression_features <- progression_features %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.nan(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.infinite(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace_na(., 0)))

dim(progression_features)
head(progression_features)


## =========================
## Tumor site features
## Baseline-only: use scans at or before sequencing
## =========================
tumor_sites_raw <- read.delim(
  paste0(base_url, "/data_timeline_tumor_sites.txt"),
  comment.char = "#",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)

tumor_sites_nsclc <- tumor_sites_raw %>%
  semi_join(analysis_step4 %>% select(PATIENT_ID), by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  filter(START_DATE <= 0) %>%   
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    START_DATE,
    SOURCE_SPECIFIC,
    TUMOR_SITE,
    CHEST,
    ABDOMEN,
    PELVIS,
    HEAD,
    OTHER
  )


scan_level_sites <- tumor_sites_nsclc %>%
  group_by(PATIENT_ID, START_DATE, SOURCE_SPECIFIC) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sites_this_scan = n_distinct(TUMOR_SITE),
    has_chest   = as.integer(any(CHEST == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    has_abdomen = as.integer(any(ABDOMEN == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    has_pelvis  = as.integer(any(PELVIS == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    has_head    = as.integer(any(HEAD == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    has_other   = as.integer(any(OTHER == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# patient-level
tumor_site_features <- scan_level_sites %>%
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_scans_sites = n(),
    tumor_sites_mean = mean(n_sites_this_scan, na.rm = TRUE),
    tumor_sites_max  = max(n_sites_this_scan, na.rm = TRUE),
    tumor_sites_min  = min(n_sites_this_scan, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_scans_chest   = mean(has_chest, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_scans_abdomen = mean(has_abdomen, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_scans_pelvis  = mean(has_pelvis, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_scans_head    = mean(has_head, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_scans_other   = mean(has_other, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_head_site    = as.integer(any(has_head == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    any_abdomen_site = as.integer(any(has_abdomen == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    any_pelvis_site  = as.integer(any(has_pelvis == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    any_other_site   = as.integer(any(has_other == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# NaN / Inf / -Inf
tumor_site_features <- tumor_site_features %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.nan(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.infinite(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace_na(., 0)))

dim(tumor_site_features)
head(tumor_site_features)


## =========================
## Construct final analysis dataset
## =========================
analysis_final <- analysis_step4 %>%
  left_join(progression_features, by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  left_join(tumor_site_features, by = "PATIENT_ID")

# NLP variables used in final model
nlp_cols <- c(
  "n_scans_progression",
  "progression_prob_mean",
  "progression_prob_max",
  "progression_prob_min",
  "progression_prob_sd",
  "last_progression_prob",
  "n_scans_sites",
  "tumor_sites_mean",
  "tumor_sites_max",
  "tumor_sites_min",
  "prop_scans_chest",
  "prop_scans_abdomen",
  "prop_scans_pelvis",
  "prop_scans_head",
  "prop_scans_other",
  "any_head_site",
  "any_abdomen_site",
  "any_pelvis_site",
  "any_other_site"
)


analysis_final <- analysis_final %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.nan(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.infinite(.), NA))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace_na(., 0)))


dim(analysis_final)
head(analysis_final)


analysis_final %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    min_n = min(n),
    max_n = max(n)
  )


colSums(is.na(analysis_final[, nlp_cols]))

```



```{r step6-fix-last-progression-prob, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


analysis_final <- analysis_final %>%
  mutate(
    last_progression_prob = as.numeric(last_progression_prob),
    last_progression_prob = ifelse(is.na(last_progression_prob), 0, last_progression_prob)
  )


summary(analysis_final$last_progression_prob)
table(is.na(analysis_final$last_progression_prob))


colSums(is.na(analysis_final))


analysis_final %>%
  count(PATIENT_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    min_n = min(n),
    max_n = max(n)
  )


analysis_final %>%
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    progression_prob_mean,
    progression_prob_max,
    progression_prob_min,
    progression_prob_sd,
    last_progression_prob,
    n_scans_sites
  ) %>%
  head()
```



```{r step7-8-cox-modeling, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

## =========================
## Define feature sets
## =========================
clinical_vars <- c(
  "age",
  "gender",
  "stage"
)

genomic_vars <- c(
  "mut_EGFR",
  "mut_RBM10",
  "mut_NF1",
  "mut_STK11",
  "mut_FAT1",
  "mut_TP53",
  "mut_KEAP1",
  "mut_PTPRD",
  "mut_KRAS",
  "mut_SMARCA4"
)

nlp_vars <- c(
  "n_scans_progression",
  "progression_prob_mean",
  "progression_prob_max",
  "n_scans_sites",
  "tumor_sites_mean",
  "tumor_sites_max"
)

## =========================
## Prepare modeling dataset
## =========================
cox_data <- analysis_final %>%
  mutate(
    gender = factor(gender),
    stage = factor(stage)
  )

# survival object uses OS time from sequencing and event indicator
surv_obj <- with(cox_data, Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event))

## =========================
## Define formulas
## =========================
formula_m1 <- as.formula(
  paste("Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~", paste(clinical_vars, collapse = " + "))
)

formula_m2 <- as.formula(
  paste("Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~", paste(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars), collapse = " + "))
)

formula_m3 <- as.formula(
  paste("Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~", paste(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars, nlp_vars), collapse = " + "))
)

## =========================
## Fit Cox models
## =========================
model1_data <- cox_data %>%
  select(OS_MONTHS, os_event, all_of(clinical_vars)) %>%
  drop_na()

model2_data <- cox_data %>%
  select(OS_MONTHS, os_event, all_of(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars))) %>%
  drop_na()

model3_data <- cox_data %>%
  select(OS_MONTHS, os_event, all_of(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars, nlp_vars))) %>%
  drop_na()

cox_m1 <- coxph(formula_m1, data = model1_data, x = TRUE)
cox_m2 <- coxph(formula_m2, data = model2_data, x = TRUE)
cox_m3 <- coxph(formula_m3, data = model3_data, x = TRUE)

summary(cox_m1)
summary(cox_m2)
summary(cox_m3)

## =========================
## C-index comparison
## =========================
get_cindex <- function(model, model_name) {
  s <- summary(model)
  data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    C_index = unname(s$concordance[1]),
    SE = unname(s$concordance[2]),
    Lower_95CI = unname(s$concordance[1] - 1.96 * s$concordance[2]),
    Upper_95CI = unname(s$concordance[1] + 1.96 * s$concordance[2])
  )
}

cindex_table <- bind_rows(
  get_cindex(cox_m1, "Model 1: Clinical only"),
  get_cindex(cox_m2, "Model 2: Clinical + Genomic"),
  get_cindex(cox_m3, "Model 3: Clinical + Genomic + NLP")
)

cindex_table

## =========================
## HR table
## =========================
extract_hr_table <- function(model, model_name) {
  s <- summary(model)
  
  coef_df <- as.data.frame(s$coefficients)
  conf_df <- as.data.frame(s$conf.int)
  
  out <- data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Variable = rownames(coef_df),
    HR = conf_df$`exp(coef)`,
    Lower_95CI = conf_df$`lower .95`,
    Upper_95CI = conf_df$`upper .95`,
    P_value = coef_df$`Pr(>|z|)`,
    row.names = NULL
  )
  
  out
}

hr_table_m1 <- extract_hr_table(cox_m1, "Model 1")
hr_table_m2 <- extract_hr_table(cox_m2, "Model 2")
hr_table_m3 <- extract_hr_table(cox_m3, "Model 3")

hr_table_all <- bind_rows(hr_table_m1, hr_table_m2, hr_table_m3)

hr_table_all


hr_table_m3

## =========================
## KM plot based on Model 3 risk groups
## =========================
# Use linear predictor from Model 3
model3_data <- model3_data %>%
  mutate(
    risk_score = predict(cox_m3, type = "lp"),
    risk_group = ntile(risk_score, 4)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    risk_group = factor(
      risk_group,
      levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
      labels = c("Q1 (Lowest risk)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4 (Highest risk)")
    )
  )

km_fit_m3 <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ risk_group, data = model3_data)

plot(
  km_fit_m3,
  col = c("black", "blue", "orange", "red"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Months since sequencing",
  ylab = "Overall survival probability",
  main = "Kaplan-Meier Curves by Model 3 Risk Groups"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(model3_data$risk_group),
  col = c("black", "blue", "orange", "red"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

## =========================
## log-rank test for KM groups
## =========================
survdiff(Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ risk_group, data = model3_data)

```


```{r cindex-table, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cindex_table %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(C_index, SE, Lower_95CI, Upper_95CI), round, 3)
  )
```




```{r hr-table-model3, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
hr_table_m3 %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(HR, Lower_95CI, Upper_95CI), round, 3),
    P_value = signif(P_value, 3)
  ) %>%
  arrange(P_value)
```




```{r cox-forest-plot-final, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

forest_df <- hr_table_m3 %>%
  
  
  filter(!is.na(HR)) %>%
  
  
  mutate(
    Variable = Variable %>%
      str_replace("^mut_", "") %>%
      str_replace("^genderMale$", "Male (vs Female)") %>%
      str_replace("^genderUnknown$", "Unknown gender") %>%
      str_replace("^stageStage 4$", "Stage 4 (vs Stage 1–3)") %>%
      str_replace("^stageUnknown$", "Unknown stage") %>%
      str_replace("^n_scans_progression$", "Number of progression scans") %>%
      str_replace("^n_scans_sites$", "Number of tumor-site scans") %>%
      str_replace("^tumor_sites_mean$", "Mean tumor sites per scan") %>%
      str_replace("^tumor_sites_max$", "Maximum tumor sites per scan")
  ) %>%
  
  
  arrange(HR) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(Variable, levels = Variable)
  )

ggplot(forest_df, aes(x = HR, y = Variable)) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower_95CI, xmax = Upper_95CI),
    height = 0.25,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  
  scale_x_log10() +
  
  labs(
    title = "Cox Model 3: Hazard Ratios with 95% CI",
    x = "Hazard Ratio (log scale)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r phase1-clean-nlp-vars}
# clean NLP feature set for final poster
# Keep only stable NLP variables and exclude problematic progression probability variables

nlp_vars_phase1 <- c(
  "n_scans_progression",
  "n_scans_sites",
  "tumor_sites_mean",
  "tumor_sites_max"
)

```



```{r phase1-define-clean-model3}
# Clean Model 3 formula for poster use
formula_m3_phase1 <- as.formula(
  paste(
    "Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~",
    paste(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars, nlp_vars_phase1), collapse = " + ")
  )
)

# Prepare modeling dataset for clean Model 3
model3_data_phase1 <- cox_data %>%
  select(OS_MONTHS, os_event, all_of(c(clinical_vars, genomic_vars, nlp_vars_phase1))) %>%
  drop_na()

```



```{r phase1-fit-clean-model3}
# Fit clean Cox Model 3
cox_m3_phase1 <- coxph(formula_m3_phase1, data = model3_data_phase1, x = TRUE)

summary(cox_m3_phase1)
```



```{r phase1-cindex-table}
# Updated C-index table for poster
cindex_table_phase1 <- bind_rows(
  get_cindex(cox_m1, "Model 1: Clinical only"),
  get_cindex(cox_m2, "Model 2: Clinical + Genomic"),
  get_cindex(cox_m3_phase1, "Model 3: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP")
)

cindex_table_phase1
```



```{r phase1-cindex-table-rounded}
cindex_table_phase1 %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(C_index, SE, Lower_95CI, Upper_95CI), round, 3)
  )
```



```{r phase1-hr-table}
# HR table for clean Model 3
hr_table_m3_phase1 <- extract_hr_table(cox_m3_phase1, "Model 3 Phase 1")

hr_table_m3_phase1
```



```{r phase1-hr-table-rounded}
hr_table_m3_phase1 %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(HR, Lower_95CI, Upper_95CI), round, 3),
    P_value = signif(P_value, 3)
  ) %>%
  arrange(P_value)
```


```{r phase1-km-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# KM plot based on clean Model 3 risk groups
model3_data_phase1 <- model3_data_phase1 %>%
  mutate(
    risk_score = predict(cox_m3_phase1, type = "lp"),
    risk_group = ntile(risk_score, 4)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    risk_group = factor(
      risk_group,
      levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
      labels = c("Q1 (Lowest risk)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4 (Highest risk)")
    )
  )

km_fit_m3_phase1 <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ risk_group, data = model3_data_phase1)

plot(
  km_fit_m3_phase1,
  col = c("black", "blue", "orange", "red"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Months since sequencing",
  ylab = "Overall survival probability",
  main = "Kaplan-Meier Curves by Clean Model 3 Risk Groups"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(model3_data_phase1$risk_group),
  col = c("black", "blue", "orange", "red"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

```



```{r phase1-logrank}
survdiff(Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ risk_group, data = model3_data_phase1)
```



```{r phase1-forest-plot, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
library(stringr)

forest_df_phase1 <- hr_table_m3_phase1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(HR)) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = Variable %>%
      str_replace("^mut_", "") %>%
      str_replace("^genderMale$", "Male (vs Female)") %>%
      str_replace("^genderUnknown$", "Unknown gender") %>%
      str_replace("^stageStage 4$", "Stage 4 (vs Stage 1–3)") %>%
      str_replace("^stageUnknown$", "Unknown stage") %>%
      str_replace("^n_scans_progression$", "Number of progression scans") %>%
      str_replace("^n_scans_sites$", "Number of tumor-site scans") %>%
      str_replace("^tumor_sites_mean$", "Mean tumor sites per scan") %>%
      str_replace("^tumor_sites_max$", "Maximum tumor sites per scan")
  ) %>%
  arrange(HR) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(Variable, levels = Variable)
  )

ggplot(forest_df_phase1, aes(x = HR, y = Variable)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower_95CI, xmax = Upper_95CI),
    width = 0.25,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Clean Cox Model 3: Hazard Ratios with 95% CI",
    x = "Hazard Ratio (log scale)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)

```

```{r rsf-load-packages}
# install.packages("ranger")   
library(ranger)
library(survival)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```

```{r rsf-module1-fit}

rsf_data <- model3_data_phase1 %>%
  select(
    OS_MONTHS,
    os_event,
    age,
    gender,
    stage,
    starts_with("mut_"),
    n_scans_progression,
    n_scans_sites,
    tumor_sites_mean,
    tumor_sites_max
  )


rsf_fit <- ranger(
  formula = Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ .,
  data = rsf_data,
  num.trees = 100,
  mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(rsf_data) - 2)),   
  min.node.size = 15,
  importance = "none",
  splitrule = "logrank",
  num.threads = 2,
  seed = 629
)

rsf_fit
```
```{r rsf-module2-cindex}

rsf_cindex <- data.frame(
  Model = "RSF: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP",
  C_index = 1 - rsf_fit$prediction.error,
  SE = NA_real_,
  Lower_95CI = NA_real_,
  Upper_95CI = NA_real_
)

rsf_cindex
```


```{r rsf-module3-cindex-table}
cindex_table_with_rsf <- bind_rows(
  cindex_table_phase1,
  rsf_cindex
)

cindex_table_with_rsf

```

```{r rsf-module4-importance-corrected, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}

rsf_fit_imp <- ranger(
  formula = Surv(OS_MONTHS, os_event) ~ .,
  data = rsf_data,
  num.trees = 100,
  mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(rsf_data) - 2)),
  min.node.size = 15,
  importance = "permutation",
  splitrule = "logrank",
  num.threads = 2,
  seed = 629
)


rsf_importance_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(rsf_fit_imp$variable.importance),
  Importance = as.numeric(rsf_fit_imp$variable.importance)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(Importance))


rsf_importance_top10 <- rsf_importance_df %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

rsf_importance_top10


ggplot(rsf_importance_top10,
       aes(x = reorder(Variable, Importance), y = Importance)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Variable Importance (RSF)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Permutation Importance"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r xgb-module1-prepare}
# install.packages("xgboost")   
library(xgboost)



xgb_data <- model3_data_phase1 %>%
  select(
    OS_MONTHS,
    os_event,
    age,
    gender,
    stage,
    starts_with("mut_"),
    n_scans_progression,
    n_scans_sites,
    tumor_sites_mean,
    tumor_sites_max
  )


xgb_x <- xgb_data %>%
  select(-OS_MONTHS, -os_event)


xgb_matrix <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = xgb_x)


xgb_label <- ifelse(xgb_data$os_event == 1, xgb_data$OS_MONTHS, -xgb_data$OS_MONTHS)


dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = xgb_matrix,
  label = xgb_label
)

dim(xgb_matrix)
head(colnames(xgb_matrix))
summary(xgb_label)
```



```{r xgb-module2-fit}
params <- list(
  objective = "survival:cox",
  eval_metric = "cox-nloglik",
  eta = 0.05,
  max_depth = 3,
  min_child_weight = 10,
  subsample = 0.8,
  colsample_bynode = 0.8
)

xgb_fit <- xgb.train(
  params = params,
  data = dtrain,
  nrounds = 100,
  verbose = 0
)

xgb_fit

```



```{r xgb-module3-cindex}
# install.packages("Hmisc")
library(Hmisc)


xgb_pred <- predict(xgb_fit, newdata = dtrain)

summary(xgb_pred)


xgb_rcorr <- rcorr.cens(-xgb_pred, Surv(xgb_data$OS_MONTHS, xgb_data$os_event))

xgb_cindex <- data.frame(
  Model = "XGB: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP",
  C_index = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]),
  SE = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred)),
  Lower_95CI = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]) - 1.96 * as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred)),
  Upper_95CI = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]) + 1.96 * as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred))
)

xgb_cindex

```

```{r xgb-module3-check}
xgb_rcorr
names(xgb_rcorr)

```
```{r xgb-module4-xgb-cindex-table}
xgb_cindex <- data.frame(
  Model = "XGB: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP",
  C_index = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]),
  SE = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred)),
  Lower_95CI = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]) -
    1.96 * as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred)),
  Upper_95CI = as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["C Index"]) +
    1.96 * as.numeric(xgb_rcorr["S.D."]) / sqrt(length(xgb_pred))
)

xgb_cindex
```



```{r xgb-module5-final-table}
cindex_table_final <- bind_rows(
  cindex_table_phase1,
  rsf_cindex,
  xgb_cindex
)

cindex_table_final
```


```{r xgb-module6-final-table-rounded}
poster_cindex_table <- cindex_table_final %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(C_index, SE, Lower_95CI, Upper_95CI), ~ round(.x, 3))
  )

poster_cindex_table
```



```{r xgb-module7-final-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
plot_df <- poster_cindex_table %>%
  mutate(
    Model = factor(
      Model,
      levels = c(
        "Model 1: Clinical only",
        "Model 2: Clinical + Genomic",
        "Model 3: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP",
        "RSF: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP",
        "XGB: Clinical + Genomic + Clean NLP"
      )
    )
  )

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Model, y = C_index)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = Lower_95CI, ymax = Upper_95CI),
    width = 0.12,
    linewidth = 1.2,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3.2) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", C_index)),
    vjust = -0.9,
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.64, 0.75),
    breaks = seq(0.64, 0.75, by = 0.02),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Model Comparison by C-index",
    x = NULL,
    y = "C-index"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r xgb-shap-module1}

shap_values <- predict(
  xgb_fit,
  newdata = dtrain,
  predcontrib = TRUE
)

dim(shap_values)
```


```{r xgb-shap-module2}

shap_df <- as.data.frame(shap_values)


shap_df <- shap_df[, colnames(shap_df) != "BIAS", drop = FALSE]


mean_abs_shap <- data.frame(
  Variable = colnames(shap_df),
  MeanAbsSHAP = colMeans(abs(shap_df))
) %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanAbsSHAP))


mean_abs_shap_top10 <- mean_abs_shap %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

mean_abs_shap_top10
```



```{r xgb-shap-module3, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}


mean_abs_shap_top10_pretty <- mean_abs_shap_top10 %>%
  mutate(
    Variable_pretty = recode(
      Variable,

      "stageStage 4" = "Stage IV",
      "stageUnknown" = "Stage Unknown",

      "genderFemale" = "Female",
      "genderMale" = "Male",
      "genderUnknown" = "Gender Unknown",

      "tumor_sites_max" = "Max Tumor Sites",
      "tumor_sites_mean" = "Mean Tumor Sites",

      "n_scans_sites" = "Scans with Sites",
      "n_scans_progression" = "Scans with Progression",

      "mut_TP53" = "TP53 Mutation",
      "mut_EGFR" = "EGFR Mutation",
      "mut_KEAP1" = "KEAP1 Mutation",
      "mut_STK11" = "STK11 Mutation",
      "mut_KRAS" = "KRAS Mutation",

      "age" = "Age",

      .default = Variable
    )
  )

mean_abs_shap_top10_pretty %>%
  select(Variable = Variable_pretty, MeanAbsSHAP)


ggplot(mean_abs_shap_top10_pretty,
       aes(x = reorder(Variable_pretty, MeanAbsSHAP),
           y = MeanAbsSHAP)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Features by Mean Absolute SHAP (XGB)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean |SHAP value|"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
